sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n47292" key="h(misu/triton" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἡμῐσύ-τρῐτον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n47292.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">a third half</tr_>, i.e. <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one and a half</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0232.tlg001:167" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Archil.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">167</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
